Home / Compare / Roots Coffee Roaster
specialty single-origin arabica craft-roaster Bangkok premium third-wave

Roots Coffee Roaster

รูทส์ คอฟฟี่

4.7
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
340 reviews
Origin Bangkok (roasting) / Northern Thailand + Imports
Roast Levels light medium
Price Range ฿350–680 / 200g
Founded 2012
Formats ground, whole bean

A pioneering Bangkok specialty roaster that helped spark Thailand's third-wave coffee movement. Roots sources from exceptional Thai highlands and global origins, roasting each to highlight origin character over process.

Official Website ↗

Flavor Profile

Third-wave precision. Expect elegant brightness, nuanced fruit complexity — often apricot, tamarind, or black currant — with a refined structure and persistent sweetness. Consistently impressive Thai single-origins.

Tasting Notes

apricot tamarind black currant brightness persistent sweetness

Flavor Breakdown

Body
2/5
Acidity
5/5
Sweetness
4/5
Bitterness
1/5
Aroma
5/5
